text: A transformer is a deep learning architecture developed by Google and based on the multi-head attention mechanism, proposed in the 2017 paper Attention Is All You Need. Text is converted to numerical representations called tokens, and each token is converted into a vector via a lookup from a word embedding table. At each layer, each token is then contextualized within the scope of the context window with other tokens via a parallel multi-head attention mechanism, allowing the signal for key tokens to be amplified and less important tokens to be diminished.

Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) encodes the absolute position of each token by rotating its query and key vectors in a complex space. The relative position between any two tokens is then naturally encoded as the difference of their rotation angles, which the dot product makes invariant to the absolute origin. RoPE generalizes well to sequence lengths longer than those seen during training, especially when combined with YaRN scaling.

Chapter 1. The morning was cold and unusually clear. Mira pulled her coat tighter and stepped onto the platform. The signal lights stretched into the distance, blue and orange and red, marking the path her train would take. Somewhere down the line, in a city she had never visited, a person she had never met was waiting for an answer she had not yet decided how to give.

When generating tokens autoregressively, recomputing the key and value tensors for the entire prefix at every step is wasteful. The KV cache stores them once and reuses them. With grouped-query attention reducing the K/V head count by 8x, the cache fits in GPU memory even at million-token contexts. Paged attention further avoids fragmentation by allocating fixed-size blocks on demand.

Flash Attention reorders the attention computation to keep the working set in fast on-chip SRAM. Tile the softmax along the sequence dimension, accumulate the running maximum and exponential sum, and you avoid materializing the full N x N attention matrix in HBM. The result is the same as standard attention but with significantly less memory traffic.

Theorem (Euclid). There are infinitely many primes. Proof. Suppose, for contradiction, that the set of primes is finite, say p_1, p_2, ..., p_n. Consider N = p_1 * p_2 * ... * p_n + 1. N is not divisible by any p_i, since dividing leaves a remainder of 1. So N is itself prime, or it has a prime factor not in the original list. Either way, our assumption that the list was complete is false.

The Industrial Revolution began in Great Britain in the late 18th century and spread to continental Europe and North America over the following hundred years. It transformed manufacturing from manual production methods to machine-based ones, primarily in textiles, iron, and later steam-powered transport. The social consequences were profound, including urbanization, the rise of a wage-labor working class, and a sharp acceleration in human population growth.

Mitochondria are membrane-bound organelles found in most eukaryotic cells, where they generate the majority of the cell's supply of adenosine triphosphate. They have their own circular DNA, distinct from the cell's nuclear DNA, which has been used to trace maternal lineages over evolutionary time.
